Evaluate a linear agent's policy

Source: R/linear.R
evaluate_policy_linear.Rd

Evaluate a linear agent's policy

Usage

evaluate_policy_linear(
  env,
  agent,
  policy = c("greedy", "select"),
  n_episodes = 20L,
  max_steps = 500L,
  seed = 10000L
)

Arguments

env

An environment object.

agent

A linear agent.

policy

"greedy" or "select".

n_episodes

Number of episodes.

max_steps

Step cap per episode.

seed

Seed.

Value

A numeric vector of episode returns.
